Klopp gave his players three days off following Saturday's 2-0 win over Tottenham that revitalised hopes of a top-four finish. (Echo)

Klopp has visited La Manga Club several times for winter training camp during his time in charge of Borussia Dortmund. (Echo)

Klopp: “Now we are in pre-season. We will use this and we will go again and again and again.”

Klopp: “The pitches are very, very good. We can be very concentrated in training and hope to make the best of the rest of the season.”

Wijnaldum: “It is normal that if you have poor results without Sadio everyone will say ‘Sadio Mane”
